nodes.context: German outlaw motorcycle club, established in 1972 in Mannheim.
Formerly Mannheim-based motorcycle club whose German chapters patched over to Hells Angels MC in 1999.
Outlaw motorcycle club that received the patchover of Bones MC German chapters in 1999.
Support club for Gremium Motorcycle Club in Germany.

edges.evidence_quote: Gremium claims to be the largest German motorcycle club since the patchover of the also formerly Mannheim-based German chapters of the Bones MC to the Hells Angels MC in 1999
edges.context: Gremium became the largest German MC after Bones MC chapters patched over to Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: patchover of the also formerly Mannheim-based German chapters of the Bones MC to the Hells Angels MC in 1999
edges.context: Bones MC German chapters merged into Hells Angels MC via patchover.

edges.evidence_quote: several associate chapters (Bad 7 MC support club) in Germany
edges.context: Bad 7 MC is a support club for Gremium.
